ddls:
CREATE TABLE "properties" (
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each property */,
  "property_name" TEXT /* Name of the property (e.g., availHeight, availWidth) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the property and its usage */,
  "property_type" TEXT /* Type of property (e.g., screen, environment, feature) */,
  "added_date" TEXT /* Date when the property was added to the database */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "browsers" (
  "browser_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each browser */,
  "browser_name" TEXT /* Name of the browser (e.g., Firefox, Chrome) */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the browser being tested */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the browser version */,
  "engine" TEXT /* Rendering engine used by the browser (e.g., Gecko, Blink) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("browser_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the user account */,
  "email" TEXT /* User's email address */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., developer, tester, admin) */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hash of the user's password for secure storage */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_results" (
  "test_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test result */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who conducted the test */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property being tested */,
  "browser_id" INTEGER /* ID of the browser being tested */,
  "test_date" TEXT /* Date when the test was conducted */,
  "result" TEXT /* Outcome of the test (e.g., supported, not supported) */,
  "test_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes on the test result */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_results_browser_id FOREIGN KEY ("browser_id") REFERENCES browsers ("browser_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_results_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_results_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each issue log */,
  "test_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test related to the issue */,
  "issue_description" TEXT /* Description of the issue encountered */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity of the issue (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "logged_date" TEXT /* Date when the issue was logged */,
  "resolved" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the issue is resolved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_logs_test_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_id") REFERENCES test_results ("test_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "platform_settings" (
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each setting */,
  "setting_name" TEXT /* Name of the setting */,
  "setting_value" TEXT /* Value of the setting */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the setting and its purpose */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("setting_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "property_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "property_property_categories" (
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("property_id", "category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_history" (
  "test_history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test history entry */,
  "test_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test */,
  "test_date" TEXT /* Date of the test */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the test */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_history_test_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_id") REFERENCES test_results ("test_id")
)
